name: Oktapodi Maratho Krasato (Octopus and Fennel
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat, pound and rub the octopus for 20 to 30 minutes on a rough stone surface until it becomes softer and secretes a grayish liquid.
2. Wash thoroughly, then drain and cook in a covered pan without adding water until the octopus turns bright pink-red and feels tender.
3. Using a sharp knife, cut into rounds the width of a small finger.
4. Heat the olive oil in a tsikali or any pot, add the scallions, and cook until translucent and soft.
5. Add the round octopus slices to the onion and pour in the wine. Simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Put the fennel and tomatoes on top of the octopus, season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Give the pot a good shake to mix well and cover.
8. Continue simmering until the octopus is fork-tender (approximately 45 to 50 minutes).
9. Serve warm or cold.
